sections.title: Information Collection
sections.content: We collect personal information such as name, email address, phone number, and shipping address when you place an order, contact support, or interact with our website. Additionally, we collect technical data including IP address, browser type, device information, and browsing behavior through cookies and analytics tools.

sections.title: Use of Information
sections.content: The collected information is used to process orders, manage transactions, improve website performance, personalize your experience, and communicate updates, offers, or support-related messages.

sections.title: Cookies & Tracking Technologies
sections.content: We use cookies and similar technologies to enhance user experience, analyze traffic, and understand user behavior. Users can manage or disable cookies through their browser settings.

sections.title: Data Sharing & Third Parties
sections.content: We do not sell or rent personal data. However, we may share information with trusted third parties such as payment processors, logistics providers, and service partners strictly for order fulfillment and operational purposes.

sections.title: User Rights
sections.content: Users have the right to access, update, or request deletion of their personal data. Requests can be made through official contact channels.

sections.title: Data Security
sections.content: We implement industry-standard security measures to protect user data. However, no method of transmission over the internet is completely secure.

sections.title: Policy Updates
sections.content: We reserve the right to update this policy at any time. Continued use of the website implies acceptance of updated terms.

sections.title: Order Processing
sections.content: Orders are processed after confirmation and payment verification. Processing time may vary depending on order volume and availability.

sections.title: Delivery Time
sections.content: Delivery timelines vary based on location but are typically within a few business days. Delays may occur due to external factors such as weather or logistics issues.

sections.title: Shipping Charges
sections.content: Shipping costs are calculated based on location, order size, and promotions. These charges are displayed at checkout.

sections.title: Tracking Orders
sections.content: Customers may receive tracking details once the order is shipped, allowing them to monitor delivery status.

sections.title: Delivery Issues
sections.content: If delivery fails due to incorrect address or unavailability, re-delivery attempts or additional charges may apply.

sections.title: Return Eligibility
sections.content: Items are eligible for return if they are unused, in original condition, and within the specified return window.

sections.title: Return Process
sections.content: Customers must initiate a return request through official channels. Items must be shipped back according to instructions provided.

sections.title: Refund Processing
sections.content: Refunds are issued after inspection of returned items and are processed to the original payment method.

sections.title: Non-Returnable Items
sections.content: Certain items such as perishable goods or hygiene-related products may not be eligible for return.

sections.title: Damaged or Defective Products
sections.content: Customers should report damaged or defective items immediately with proof for quick resolution or replacement.

sections.title: Acceptance of Terms
sections.content: By accessing or using the website, users agree to comply with these terms and all applicable laws.

sections.title: User Responsibilities
sections.content: Users must provide accurate information and must not misuse the website for illegal or harmful activities.

sections.title: Product Information
sections.content: We strive to ensure accurate product descriptions, but errors may occur and are subject to correction.

sections.title: Pricing & Payments
sections.content: All prices are subject to change. Orders will only be processed after successful payment.

sections.title: Limitation of Liability
sections.content: We are not liable for indirect or incidental damages resulting from the use of our website or products.

sections.title: Changes to Terms
sections.content: We reserve the right to modify these terms at any time without prior notice.
